nodes.label: Hub Template Trim Marker Indentation Rule
nodes.norm_label: hub template trim marker indentation rule

nodes.label: Operator Version Control via CSV labels
nodes.norm_label: operator version control via csv labels

nodes.label: GitLab Service Mode (managed/external/bundled)
nodes.rationale: Each backend (db/redis/object-storage) defaults to managed; if a managed operator is missing GitLab falls back to bundled. external lets users provide connection secrets; bundled uses GitLab built-in components, not recommended for production.

nodes.label: CNPG endpointCA requires a Secret not a ConfigMap
nodes.rationale: CNPG endpointCA is a SecretKeySelector, so the service-ca ConfigMap content (injected via service.beta.openshift.io/inject-cabundle) is copied into a Secret so barman can pass --ca-certificate for S3 SSL validation.
nodes.norm_label: cnpg endpointca requires a secret not a configmap

nodes.label: Redis image sourced from GitOps operator ARGOCD_REDIS_IMAGE
nodes.rationale: The GitOps operator ships rhel9/redis-7 as a relatedImage in its CSV so oc-mirror captures it automatically; reading ARGOCD_REDIS_IMAGE from the operator env yields the exact pinned digest guaranteed to exist in disconnected mirrors. Falls back to :latest for connected environments.
nodes.norm_label: redis image sourced from gitops operator argocd_redis_image

nodes.label: Artifactory master-key/join-key must be created manually
nodes.rationale: master-key encrypts data at rest and must be stable across restarts/upgrades; join-key authenticates HA nodes. Auto-generation would produce new random values each enforce cycle, breaking the install, so they are created once manually.
nodes.norm_label: artifactory master-key/join-key must be created manually

nodes.label: Gitaly HA via Praefect
nodes.rationale: Default single Gitaly pod is a SPOF; Praefect adds a gRPC proxy layer with replicated Gitaly StatefulSet and a praefect_production DB in the existing CNPG cluster using the gitlab user, avoiding new clusters/secrets.

nodes.label: AAP NooBaa S3 Object Storage Backing
nodes.norm_label: aap noobaa s3 object storage backing

nodes.label: ODF Ceph CSI Plugin Node Tolerations
nodes.norm_label: odf ceph csi plugin node tolerations

nodes.label: Status panel (Submariner add-ons 0, Clusters 1, Cluster pools 0)
